evals.prompt: Create a full carousel for TikTok and Instagram promoting Citadel AI's AI receptionist for dental offices.
evals.expected_output: Produce all 6 slides following the Hook/Problem/Agitation/Solution/Feature/CTA arc with correct specs and API call.
expectations: The response produces exactly 6 slides in Hook/Problem/Agitation/Solution/Feature/CTA order
The response specifies 9:16 vertical format and 768x1376px resolution
The response specifies JPG format (not PNG)
The response includes the TikTok Upload-Post API call with auto_add_music=true and privacy_level=PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE
The response states no text in the bottom 20% of any slide

evals.prompt: Our last 8 carousels averaged 1.7% engagement rate. Diagnose what's probably wrong.
evals.expected_output: Analyze failure causes in priority order, reference learnings.json as the diagnostic tool, and recommend specific A/B testing over the next 6 carousels.
expectations: The response analyzes Slide 1 hook type as the primary failure candidate
The response mentions auto_add_music as a potential cause of distribution loss
The response references learnings.json as the diagnostic tracking tool
The response recommends A/B testing 3 different hook types over next 6 carousels
The response states a target engagement rate of 5%+

evals.prompt: Build a carousel for @AutomateBrain: '5 AI tools that replace a $5K/month employee'
evals.expected_output: Produce all 6 slides matching the exact example from SKILL.md with correct format specs and API call.
expectations: Slide 1 uses the hook '5 AI tools that replace a $5K/month employee'
Slide 5 contains the phrase 'Setup in under 1 hour'
Slide 6 contains 'Save this + follow for more AI tools'
The response specifies JPG format and 9:16 aspect ratio
The response includes API call spec with auto_add_music=true
